blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,812 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
